arts.ttl: Premier League: Predictions for all seven games on Saturday
arts.sum: The Premier League reaches matchday 20 this weekend and James Mason has collated our writers' best bets for all seven games being played on Saturday.

arts.ttl: I saw what Savinho did in plain sight to send Man City challenge to underperforming teammate
arts.sum: Manchester City pulled a move right from the training ground when they beat Leicester as Savinho's recent improvement continued.

arts.ttl: Transfer rumors, news: Manchester City eyeing Lens' Khusanov
arts.sum: Manchester City are looking at a possible move for Lens centre-back Abdukodir Khusanov. Transfer Talk has the latest news, gossip and rumors.

arts.ttl: “Fully understand” | Hammers make huge profits in last financial year
arts.sum: West Ham made huge profits in the last financial year, the club have announced. After the departure of David Moyes, it was clear that the Summer transfer window needed to be a big one for our Irons. The squad had some obvious issues, and they would cause the downfall of whoever came in if not... arts.ttl: “Laughable” | Shocking reason West Ham haven’t sacked Lopetegui
arts.sum: The shocking reason that Julen Lopetegui hasn’t been sacked by the West Ham board. West Ham’s performance under Julen Lopetegui have been completely unacceptable, they should be enough to get him sacked alone, but his relationship with the players, and an abysmal defensive record starts to give the impression that his position is becoming untenable.... arts.ttl: “Complete 180” | West Ham completely change January window strategy
arts.sum: West Ham’s transfer strategy completely flipped on its head due to Jarrod Bowen’s injury. The last thing West Ham and Julen Lopetegui needed was their captain Jarrod Bowen to suffer from any type of injury. Unfortunately, his fractured foot will keep him sidelined for a significant amount of time. As a result, it’s been reported... arts.ttl: West Ham ace pushing for January exit; club willing to sanction a move
arts.sum: West Ham may be set for changes in January, with reports suggesting that Brazilian centre-back Luizao is seeking a departure from the club. The 22-year-old, who arrived at the London Stadium during David Moyes’ tenure in January 2023, has struggled to break into the senior squad, instead featuring primarily for the U21 team. arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola targets Bundesliga hotshot in bid to shore up his creaking squad this month - but there WON'T be a clearout of struggling stars
arts.sum: Txiki Begiristain's final market as sporting director is set to be busier than the Basque will have envisioned when informing the champions that he would depart at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Man City vs. West Ham: 'There's a good chance he might be benched' - Pep Guardiola to replace out-of-form City man with James McAtee?
arts.sum: An out-of-form Man City player is at risk of being benched by Pep Guardiola for Saturday's Premier League clash with West Ham United at the Etihad Stadium, Citizens expert Steven McInerney tells Sports Mole.

arts.ttl: James McAtee: "The penny might have finally dropped" as Pep Guardiola urged to avoid "really bad" Cole Palmer, Morgan Rogers Man City repeat
arts.sum: "The penny might have finally dropped" for Man City manager Pep Guardiola regarding his use of James McAtee as a first-team player, Citizens expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole.
